name: PHOTRONICS INC
business: The company sells substantially all of its photomasks to designers and manufacturers of IC and FPD electronic devices. Photomask technology is also applied to the fabrication of other high-technology products including advanced packaging modules, micro optical components, silicon photonics, MEMS, and nanotechnology applications. The selling cycle is tightly interwoven with the development and release of new semiconductor and display designs and applications.
sellsTo: designers and manufacturers of IC and FPD electronic devices
micro optical components for applications such as virtual reality/augmented reality and silicon photonics

exposures.sentence: The photomask industry is dependent on the semiconductor and display industries, which are subject to rapid technological change and fluctuations in capacity needs.

The global semiconductor and FPD industries are driven by end markets which have broad application in the global economy including but not limited to consumer-driven applications, data centers that support AI implementation, electric vehicles and national security.

Photomask technology is also being applied to the fabrication of other high-technology products including advanced packaging modules, micro optical components for applications such as virtual reality/augmented reality and silicon photonics, micro-electronic mechanical systems (MEMS), and diverse nanotechnology applications.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditure expected to be approximately $330 million in fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: We estimate capital expenditures for our fiscal year 2026 will be approximately $330 million; these investments will be targeted towards high-end and mainstream point tools that will increase our operating capacity and efficiency and enable us to support our customers near-term demands.
